prompt: A realistic Spanish sports newspaper front page in the style of a major daily broadsheet, clean white background with strong red and black typography, editorial print layout, high-resolution scanned-paper look. At the very top, an oversized red masthead reading MARCA spans nearly the full width, with a small black price in the upper-right corner reading 2,50€. Beneath the masthead, a thin line of small black publication details includes a Tuesday date, website, year, and issue number. The dominant main headline on the left takes up most of the page in gigantic bold condensed black uppercase letters over two lines: ARBELOA, DESTITUIDO. Below it, a red subheadline in bold sentence case says that Real Madrid dismisses the coach after 100 days on the bench and seeks a replacement until the end of the season. A smaller black explanatory line underneath mentions the decision following Champions League elimination and loss of the LaLiga lead. The main photo occupies the lower-left majority of the cover: a suited football coach standing in a stadium with blue seats, one hand touching his forehead in a stressed or disappointed gesture, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, and dark tie, with the Bernabéu environment visible and a pitch-side barrier reading Real Madrid C. F. Along the bottom of the main image, a small caption line notes that the coach leaves the Bernabéu after learning the decision. At the very bottom left and center are 2 narrow columns of small black article text in Spanish newspaper style. To the right side, a vertical sidebar contains 2 stacked secondary stories separated by red divider lines. The top sidebar story has a red section label reading NBA PLAYOFFS, a bold black headline saying the Lakers force game seven, a rectangular action photo of 2 basketball players with a Lakers player in a purple number 77 jersey going up with the ball against a Nuggets defender, and a short caption below mentioning Doncic scoring 42 points in Denver. The lower sidebar story has a red section label reading TENIS · MUTUA MADRID OPEN, a bold black headline about Alcaraz dominating at the Caja Mágica, and a rectangular tennis photo of a player in light purple kit hitting a forehand against a bright blue backdrop. Near the bottom center-right, include a pull-quote box marked by large red quotation marks and bold black text reading Agradezco al club la oportunidad de mi vida. Overall composition should feel like an authentic dramatic sports front page: sharp print typography, rigid newspaper grid, realistic photojournalism, heavy black headline blocks, red accents, and a contemporary Spanish press design.
